message:
test(extensions): refine sensitive key detection in registration artifacts

Improve is_sensitive_json_key() to avoid false positives on config keys
like "maxTokens" while still catching actual token fields:

- key == "token" || key.ends_with("_token") catches exact token fields
- key.ends_with("token") && !key.ends_with("tokens") avoids "maxTokens"
- Remove "bearer" from sensitive list (not a key name, it's a scheme)
- Reformat capture_registration_artifacts closure indentation
- Call capture_registration_artifacts in e2e_command_execute_returns_display

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
